title: A Day in the Life: Software Engineer & Athlete
description: A complete look at my daily routine: 20/4 fasting, morning calisthenics, deep work sessions, and evening training. See how I balance high-performance living with a demanding career.

title: Balkan Motorcycle Adventure: 2000km in 10 Minutes
description: The highlights from my solo journey through Serbia, Montenegro, and Bosnia. Epic roads, stunning scenery, and the freedom of the open road.

title: Complete One-Arm Pullup Tutorial: From Zero to One
description: Everything you need to know to achieve your first one-arm pullup. Progressions, programming, common mistakes, and the mental game.

title: Why I Cancelled My Gym Membership (And Got Stronger)
description: The story of transitioning from weightlifting to calisthenics, and why I believe bodyweight training is superior for most people.

title: 20/4 Fasting: What I Eat in a Day
description: A detailed breakdown of my meals during my 4-hour eating window. Macros, timing, and the philosophy behind my nutrition choices.

title: My Home Gym Setup (Under $500)
description: A tour of my minimalist home gym and how to build serious strength with minimal equipment. Pull-up bar, rings, and creativity.

title: Solo Motorcycle Camping in the Mountains
description: An overnight adventure into the mountains with nothing but my bike, a tent, and the essentials. The peace of solitude and the beauty of nature.

title: Front Lever Progression: 6 Months to Full Hold
description: My complete front lever journey from absolute beginner to a solid 10-second hold. The exercises, programming, and lessons learned.

title: Handstand Tutorial: From Wall to Free
description: A comprehensive guide to learning the handstand. Proper alignment, balance drills, and the mental approach to inversion.

title: Supplements I Actually Take (And Why)
description: An honest breakdown of my supplement stack. What's backed by science, what's experimental, and what I've stopped taking.
